reviews.comment:
Un paraíso en medio de la nada, se puede pernoctar amplio playon con canilla para cargar casa rodante etc. Serviclub con horario, dejo foro de todo. Agua caliente libre de noche, wi-fi.

(Translated by Google)
A paradise in the middle of nowhere, you can stay overnight in a large open area with a tap for filling up your RV, etc. Service center with set hours; I'll leave a link to the forum for everything. Free hot water at night, Wi-Fi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHN29UTlV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena zona para armar carpas. Está bien para viajerxs, ya que en muchos km no hay nada.
El Shop está bueno, los chicos atienen muy bien (solo vimos a 2 atendiendo muchísima gente), pero cierra a las 22hs.
A los baños les falta mantemiento.
Creo que para la zona que está ya podría ser una Full con todos los servicios.

(Translated by Google)
Good area for pitching tents. It's good for travelers, since there's nothing for many kilometers around.
The shop is nice, the staff are very helpful (we only saw two serving a lot of people), but it closes at 10 pm.
The bathrooms need maintenance. I think that for the area it's in, it could already be a full-service campsite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBbUtfdElBEAE
